Share.d:
You can check the status of the mobile data with this task: ON or OFF.
Notes: - If the name of the Custom Setting (also table) is different, customize it using the one for your device.

Profile.nme: (Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate

Condition.rhs: .*Net Set \(User\)|Wan Check Switch|Ping Test|Redundant Net Src.*

Profile.nme: Mobile Data Var Set via Automate

Share.d:
You can check the status of the mobile data with this task: ON or OFF.
Notes: - If the name of the Custom Setting (also table) is different, customize it using the one for your device.

Profile.nme: Bottom "Buffer" Profile. Not To Be Used

Action.label: Tasker - low power mode enable (Automate flo)

Action.Str: fg loc flag set & loc enabled
Wan Check Switch , Redundant Net Src , Fg Net Set , Fg Net Unset , Bg Net Set , Net Unset
Toggle Data , Wan Check , Redundant Net Src Switch , Net Src Switch
Wan Check Switch, Redundant Net Src , Fg Net Set , Fg Net Unset , Bg Net Set , Net Unset
Wan Check Switch, Redundant Net Src , Fg Net Set , Fg Net Unset , Bg Net Set , Net Unset
Toggle Data , Wan Check , Redundant Net Src Switch , Net Src Switch

Action.label: use only WiFi if no sim
if connection NOT made disable wifi & enable data

Action.Str: No Sim. Wait 20s or until conn before disabling WiFi
disable airplane mode for redundant data usage. Only wifi used for now
No WiFi conn made after 20s. disabling

Action.label: enable data when conn not made

Action.Str: wan iface switch count limit reached
wan iface switch count limit reached
wan iface switch count limit reached
"Net Set (User)", "Net Set", "Wan Check Switch", "Ping Test", "Net Src Disconnected Switch", "Redundant Net Src", "Net Unset"
"Net Set (User)", "Net Set", "Wan Check Switch", "Ping Test", "Net Src Disconnected Switch", "Redundant Net Src", "Net Unset"
unsetting fg net app flags after 10s
Ping values unset. Stopped ping test
bg loc flag set & loc enabled
Cannot toggle data. Airplane mode enabled
Data left enabled. Turn on screen to disable data
Data left enabled. Unlock to disable data
No root. Cannot set cpu settings
All cores set to max freq & perf gov
No root. Cannot set cpu settings
All cores set to schedutil gov & P cores to min freq
"Net Set", "Net Unset", "Net Src Disconnected Switch", "Wan Check Switch", "Ping Test"
"Net Set", "Net Unset", "Net Src Disconnected Switch", "Wan Check Switch", "Ping Test"
Tasker initializating lazy workflow at boot

Action.label: Tasker - Check Set boot stuff (Automate flo)
Tasker - Cellular Data state check (Automate flo)

Condition.rhs: *(Un)Set Sim Presence Airplane Mode via Automate*

Action.Str: No root bin found. Disabled profiles needing root
Tasker - lazy workflow at boot initialized
"Wan Check Switch", "Ping Test", "Net Src Disconnected Switch"
"Wan Check Switch", "Ping Test", "Net Src Disconnected Switch"

Action.label: Tasker - low power mode enable (Automate flo)

Action.Str: Bluetooth left enabled. Unlock to disable
Bluetooth left enabled. Turn on screen to disable
